opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I used an injection for erectile dysfunction earlier, and now it has been completely rigid for over six hours and the pain is absolutely agonizing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has been rock hard for more than six hours and it has nothing to do with being turned on anymore — it just won't go down and the pain has been getting worse and worse over the last few hours.

symptom_narrative.onset: earlier this evening, after using an intracavernosal injection for erectile dysfunction
symptom_narrative.duration: more than six hours and not settling
symptom_narrative.character: a fully rigid, unwanted erection with excruciating pain deep in the shaft; the erection is not associated with any sexual desire
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolutely agonizing — the worst pain, cannot bear any clothing touching it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the shaft of the penis; the tip/head feels soft while the sides feel like stone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and progressively worsening over the last three hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps hurting more on its own and any touch or movement is unbearable
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: finding it very hard to start passing urine because of how hard and tight it is
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing in severe distress, unable to wear any clothing over the lower body, cannot sit still

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: erectile dysfunction, for which I use a penile injection

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an injection I put into the penis for erections (alprostadil / prostaglandin)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home alone; used the erectile-dysfunction injection earlier in the evening and denies any recent injury or knock to the area

objective_data_offered.value: the penis is fully erect and rigid while the head/tip looks soft, and there is an early blue / dark-red discolouration appearing along the shaft
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone image in poor lighting; colour and rigidity cannot be objectively assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: I'm sweating and clammy and can't keep still because of the pain
I can barely start to pass urine because it is so hard and tight
the empty packaging from the penile injection I used is here in the bathroom
